option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".presentation.main.teacher.dashboard.TeacherDashboardFragment">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:text="Teacher Dashboard" android:textSize="20sp" />
</FrameLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:text="Teacher Home" android:textSize="20sp" />
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/color_bg_primary" android:elevation="8dp" app:navigationIcon="@null" app:title="@string/app_name" app:titleTextColor="@color/color_text_accent" />
<androidx.fragment.app.FragmentContainerView android:id="@+id/teacherNavHostFragment" android:name="androidx.navigation.fragment.NavHostFragment" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:defaultNavHost="true" app:navGraph="@navigation/nav_teacher" />
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottomNavigationView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@color/color_bg_primary" app:itemIconTint="@color/bottom_nav_color" app:itemTextColor="@color/bottom_nav_color" app:menu="@menu/menu_teacher_bottom_nav" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:id="@+id/teacherDashboardFragment" android:icon="@drawable/ic_home" android:title="@string/home" /> <item android:id="@+id/teacherClassesFragment" android:icon="@drawable/ic_menu_book" android:title="@string/my_classes" /> <item android:id="@+id/teacherHomeworkListFragment" android:icon="@drawable/ic_assignment" android:title="@string/homeworks" /> </menu>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/nav_teacher" app:startDestination="@id/teacherDashboardFragment">
<fragment android:id="@+id/teacherDashboardFragment" android:name="stud.euktop.schooljournal.presentation.main.teacher.dashboard.TeacherDashboardFragment" android:label="Главная" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_teacher_dashboard" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/teacherClassesFragment" android:name="stud.euktop.schooljournal.presentation.main.teacher.teacherClass.TeacherClassesFragment" android:label="Мои классы" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_teacher_classes" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/teacherLessonsFragment" android:name="stud.euktop.schooljournal.presentation.main.teacher.teacherLessons.TeacherLessonsFragment" android:label="Уроки" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_teacher_lessons"> <argument android:name="classId" app:argType="integer" /> <argument android:name="subjectId" app:argType="integer" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/lessonMarksFragment" android:name="stud.euktop.schooljournal.presentation.main.teacher.lessonMarks.LessonMarksFragment" android:label="Оценки за урок" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_lesson_marks"> <argument android:name="lessonId" app:argType="integer" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/teacherHomeworkListFragment" android:name="stud.euktop.schooljournal.presentation.main.teacher.homework.TeacherHomeworkListFragment" android:label="Домашние задания" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_teacher_homework_list" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/profileFragment" android:name="stud.euktop.schooljournal.presentation.main.profile.ProfileFragment" android:label="Профиль" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_profile" />
</navigation>
